note: Cross-cutting registry of every entity type Phase 1 ingestion should resolve against. IDs are stable across players-seed.json, mlp-teams.json, tournaments-2026.json, and media-sources.json. Phase 4 AI Q&A will retrieve against these IDs — so stability matters. Every entity gets displayName + summary + stable ID per CLAUDE.md § AI-retrievable Schema.

categories.players: See data/master/players-seed.json for 30-player seed. IDs are slug-case (e.g., 'anna-leigh-waters').
categories.mlpTeams: See data/master/mlp-teams.json for all 20 teams. IDs are slug-case (e.g., 'st-louis-shock').
categories.tournaments: See data/master/tournaments-2026.json for 57 events. IDs are '<circuit>-<year>-<slug>' (e.g., 'ppa-2026-atlanta-championships').
categories.organizations: Governance / pro-circuit bodies. Fixed list below.
categories.commentators: TV/stream commentators worth tracking. Thin list; expand in Phase 2+.
categories.executives: UPA + USAP + DUPR + MLP leadership worth tracking. Thin list; expand in Phase 2+.
categories.coaches: Top professional coaches. Thin list; expand in Phase 2+.
categories.mediaCreators: See data/master/media-sources.json (newsletters, podcasts, social) and data/master/video-sources.json (YouTube channels).

organizations.summary: Holding company unifying PPA Tour and MLP since 2023-2024 merger. Coordinates schedules, player contracts, and media rights.
Professional-tier governance body launched 2024 as alternative to USAP for pro events after UPA–USAP rift.
National governing body. Publishes the Official Rulebook, certifies referees, approves paddles/balls, manages amateur ratings via DUPR partnership since 2024.
The largest professional pickleball tour. Weekly events with prize purses. Rankings use rolling 52-week + 'The Race' calendar-year formats. Now under UPA umbrella.
Team franchise league. 20 teams in 2026 (Premier-only after Challenger elimination). Mixed-gender team-match format with DreamBreaker tiebreaker. Owned by DUPR consolidation; under UPA umbrella.
Official exclusive skill-rating system for USA Pickleball since 2024. Elo-style 2.0–8.0+ scale. Powers MLP, Collegiate Pickleball, National Junior Pickleball.
International coordinating body, founded 2008. Relatively dormant governance role; member federations handle most cross-border sanctioning.
Secondary professional tour. Tier below PPA; mixed pro-amateur fields.

executives.summary: PPA Tour founder/CEO. Central figure in the UPA merger.
DUPR founding and product leadership — exact executive identities to be filled via Phase 2 research.

coaches.summary: Mother and mixed-doubles partner of Anna Leigh Waters; successful pro in her own right.
Pickleball Therapy host; coach focused on 50+ player development.

caveats: Commentators, executives, and coaches are intentionally thin — Phase 2+ content expansion. Phase 0 captures the scaffolding.
Stable IDs are a Phase 4 requirement (AI Q&A retrieval). Any rename must go through an ID-alias mechanism — do not break IDs mid-project.
